task.summary: Default task
fixed problem with switching to another employer - not persisted across fragment changes
worked out some problems with verifying that time worked becomes ot when over 8 hours and dbl ot when over 12 hours
minor issues
worked on adding the new functionalities to WorkOrderHistoryTimeUpdateFragment.kt from WorkOrderHistoryTimeFragment.kt as template
upgraded default database to current version
fixed issue when there is no payday in PayDetailFragmentNew.kt
backup EmployerObj.kt and EmployerLogicViewModel.kt
working on moving EmployerAddFragment.kt functions to EmployerLogicViewModel.kt
changing view settings
Experimented with data binding directly to xml layout file and gave up
minor tweak
upgraded AGP to latest and associated dependancies
upgraded Kotlin
working on new capability to add hours for the day directly
working on new capability to add hours for the day directly
fixed some problems with paths when porting to linux
removed default menu bar and made a custom menu bar
Fixed some difficulties with porting from Linux to Windows
reopened in Linux
working on WorkDateTimes.kt and integrating with other fragments
Got the skeleton of the WorkDateTimesFragment.kt in place. Only basic functionality available yet
fixed save menu on add fragments not appearing
fixed 2 crashes
changed icon for save to contrasting white against colored toolbar
working on WorkDateTimesFragment.kt some functionality works
worked out some bugs in WorkDateTimesFragment.kt Ready for some real world testing
working on WorkDateTimesFragment.kt getting times to adjust properly
fixed WorkDateTimesFragment.kt getting times to adjust properly
fixed WorkDateTimesFragment.kt updating properly now as far as tested Will do real world testing
put string file in alphabetic order
working on WorkOrderHistoryTimeFragment.kt to refactor and tweak
working on WorkOrderHistoryTimeFragment.kt ready for testing in real world
fixed display problem with mxl layout files
converted strainArrays to enums
many refactoring and new files
refactoring added a test database
upgraded Gradle and others
Interim updates to the time fragments until the WorkTimes class is built
small tweaks
small error causing crash
Changes before redoing time fragments
made backup copies of timeFragments
backups and made time sheet scrollable for the entire page for landscape
minor tweaks for work times
minor bug fixes
bug fix in daily time entry
daily time entry seems to be fixed
upgrade agp to 9.0
